claim_boundary: Unmodified CV32E40P frontend/recon only; no transform applied and no full selected-flow PPA baseline, formal, toggle, cold-replay, or optimization-win claim.

design.license: Solderpad Hardware License 0.51, Apache-2.0 option noted in upstream LICENSE

bounded_frontend_receipt.description: CV32E40P SystemVerilog conversion plus Yosys hierarchy/proc/opt/fsm/memory frontend only. This intentionally stops before dfflibmap/ABC/STA because full selected-flow mapping exceeded the cheap scout budget in the scratch run.
notes: The source list excludes cv32e40p_fp_wrapper.sv because this lint-wrapper configuration sets FPU=0; including it requires fpnew_pkg and is not needed for the disabled FPU path.
The previous scratch full-map attempt progressed through frontend elaboration and stopped during ABC mapping of cv32e40p_mult; no area/timing receipt is claimed here.

source_only_detector_recon.decision: Source-level signal exists, but spend still requires residual evidence from the selected frontend view.

frontend_filtered_detector_recon.decision: Current frontend-filtered replay on athanor-kairos main 3e9214dc removes constant-prop leads and the prior sleep_unit formal/SVA false positives, leaving only the load_store_unit datapath shared-term rows. Those rows have a bounded neutral module profile, so no CV32E40P candidate clears the current pre-spend bar.

bounded_module_profiles.boundary: Module-level generic Yosys profile only; no full-core PPA, formal, toggle, cold-replay, or accepted-win claim.

next_step: Prefer new detector families or a selected-flow full-core harness before CV32E40P equivalence/toggle spend; the current ATH-2685 shared-term/constant-prop families have no spend-ready CV32E40P lead.
